name: Pizza Pomodoro
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle yeast over warm water in a small bowl and stir until dissolved.
2. Stir in sugar. Let stand until the mixture begins to bubble.
3. Stir in milk, garlic, and 1 teaspoon salt.
4. Gradually beat in flour until a moderately stiff dough forms.
5. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead until smooth and satiny (10-12 minutes).
6. Shape into a ball and place in a lightly greased bowl, turning to grease all sides. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled.
7. Punch dough down. Roll out on a lightly floured surface to a 13x9-inch rectangle.
8. Place on a lightly greased baking sheet sprinkled with cornmeal.
9. Brush dough with half of the oil. Arrange tomato slices slightly overlapping in rows on top.
10. Brush tomatoes with remaining oil and season to taste with salt and pepper.
11. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until edges of pizza dough are browned.
12. Sprinkle with fresh basil and cheese. Cut into 2x4-inch pieces.
